name: exposureCalc
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (registerLensAction). NOT assassin-driven — it lives only in LENS_ACTIONS, which the assassin's MACROS enumeration cannot see; this is an authored contract pinned by server/tests/photography-lens-macros.test.js. The PhotographyActionPanel sends { artifact: { data: { iso, aperture, ev } } } which the dispatch peels to the inner data via peelRedundantArtifactWrapper, so the handler reads artifact.data.iso/aperture/ev. POISON: iso via parseInt|0→100 fallback, aperture/ev via parseFloat fallback — '1e999'/'Infinity'/'NaN' collapse to defaults, shutterSpeed stays a finite readable string (never NaN).
